message:
feat(db): optional tropism predictions + async cache writes

- db-runtime(BunSqliteRepository): debounce bias/codon vector cache persistence and prefer Bun.write; flush pending writes on close; tolerate missing tropism_predictions table (older phage.db builds) by returning an empty list.
- web(SqlJsRepository): add optional tropism_predictions prepared statement; cache results and include tropismPredictions on PhageFull for consumers.
